## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean; `go vet`, `go test`, `go build` pass
- [ ] Design docs / ADRs updated in this PR if architecture, config schema, URL conventions, or public CLI behavior changed
